notableEvents.label: Alek Thomas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alek Thomas grounds into a double play, shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. James McCann out at 2nd. Alek Thomas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Alek Thomas rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alek Thomas grounds into a double play, shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. James McCann out at 2nd. Alek Thomas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: James McCann GIDP
notableEvents.detail: James McCann grounds into a double play, shortstop Andrés Giménez to second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Tim Tawa out at 2nd. James McCann out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrés Giménez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Giménez grounds into a double play, second baseman Ketel Marte to shortstop Jose Fernandez to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Eloy Jiménez out at 2nd. Andrés Giménez out at 1st.
